[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111110010 6
1 111101101 7
2 101111100 6
3 111111000 6
4 101110101 6
5 111110010 6
6 010101101 5
7 000000000 a

70 07 101111101 7
